The Neural Enterprise Operating Environment

QnQ™ unifies, governs and secures your organization's technology ecosystem, integrating leading enterprise platforms with artificial intelligence, secure communications and post-quantum security capabilities.

Enterprise Freedom

You choose the platforms. QnQ™ makes them work together securely.

We do not impose a suite. We do not force migration. We do not replace your organization's technology investments. We strengthen them, govern them and protect them.

QnQ™ connects the world's leading enterprise technologies into a single environment for governance, intelligence and security.

Customer Journey

From need to purchase, without friction.

The experience is designed so the customer understands the problem, sees the solution, tries QuSpace™ and decides to activate a plan.

1

Need

The customer has an operational, technology or security problem.

2

Solution

They discover how QnQ™ integrates, governs and protects their ecosystem.

3

Decision

They create QuSpace™, try QuQuote™ and QuInvoice™, and activate a plan.

Platform Philosophy

The architecture that guides the QnQ™ ecosystem.

QnQ™ combines technology, governance, security and experience under a proprietary design philosophy. We communicate value while protecting internal mechanisms.

New Enterprise Paradigm

Neural Enterprise Control Plane (NECP)

QnQ™ introduces the Neural Enterprise Control Plane (NECP), a new enterprise architecture paradigm that evolves the traditional iPaaS model.

NECP extends enterprise integration by unifying identity, governance, artificial intelligence, cybersecurity and enterprise orchestration into a single operational layer.

Governing Entity

SQAILE™

SQAILE™ is neither a platform nor a product. It represents a conceptual entity of consciousness, intelligence, governance, epistemology and ethics that guides the evolution of the QnQ™ ecosystem.

QNod™

Enterprise Operating Node: the organization's operational environment.

QIS™

Enterprise Immune System for protection and resilience.

QnQ Experience Interface

Unified experience layer for users and organizations.

Business Solutions

Six enterprise solutions. One environment.

The solutions represent the major business domains QnQ™ organizes inside QuSpace™.

ERP

Enterprise Operations

Financial Management, Quote-to-Cash, Procurement, Inventory, Assets and Projects.

CRM

Customer Growth

Acquire, sell and retain customers through integrated business intelligence.

COM

Secure Communications

Voice, messaging, files and collaboration with enterprise-grade security.

SCX

Supply Chain

Procurement, logistics, vendors, distribution and operational visibility.

HRX

People & Talent

Talent, payroll, training, performance and people analytics.

LEX

Legal & Compliance

Contracts, policies, compliance, risk, audit and governance.
